use_codes.desc: FOR THE LONG-TERM, ONCE-DAILY, MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF BRONCHOSPASM ASSOCIATED WITH CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE (COPD), INCLUDING CHRONIC BRONCHITIS AND EMPHYSEMA
ADMINISTRATION OF AN INHALABLE POWDER COMPRISING TIOTROPIUM VIA DEVICE
TREATMENT OF CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE

indications.text:
SPIRIVA HandiHaler (tiotropium bromide inhalation powder) is indicated for the long-term,
once-daily, maintenance treatment of bronchospasm associated with chronic obstructive
pulmonary disease (COPD), including chronic bronchitis and emphysema.

SPIRIVA HandiHaler (tiotropium bromide inhalation powder) is indicated for the long-term, once-daily, maintenance treatment of bronchospasm associated with
chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), including chronic bronchitis and emphysema. SPIRIVA HandiHaler is indicated to reduce exacerbation...
